name: MOSIP
summary: Modular open-source foundational identity platform for enrollment, identity repository, authentication, and integrations.
implementationNotes: Validate legal mandate and data-protection basis
Design exception paths for people not yet covered

name: OpenCRVS
summary: Civil registration platform for births, deaths, and vital events.
implementationNotes: Confirm CRVS authority ownership
Use minimal validation tokens where possible

name: Mojaloop
summary: Open-source reference model and software for interoperable inclusive instant payment systems.
implementationNotes: Test settlement, reversals, failed payments, fees, and reconciliation
Map the actual national payment operators

name: X-Road
summary: Secure data exchange layer for approved organizations to exchange signed, logged messages.
implementationNotes: Define agency onboarding rules
Publish service contracts and audit responsibilities

name: Apache APISIX
summary: Open-source API gateway for routing, authentication, observability, and policy controls across services.
implementationNotes: Pair API routing with clear data-sharing agreements
Log every service-to-service request

name: OpenG2P
summary: Open platform for registries, eligibility, enrollment, and government-to-person benefit delivery.
implementationNotes: Validate targeting and grievance processes
Integrate with the payment rail people can actually access

name: OpenSPP
summary: Modular social protection platform with registries and programme operations, including farmer registry patterns.
implementationNotes: Check whether an existing registry can be cleaned before creating a new one
Design consent, correction, and deduplication workflows

name: DHIS2
summary: Health information system used for reporting, analytics, public health programmes, and facility data.
implementationNotes: Separate patient-level records from aggregate reporting
Use standard data dictionaries across programmes

name: OpenMRS
summary: Open-source electronic medical record system for patient-level care.
implementationNotes: Protect patient privacy by default
Define facility workflows before integrations

name: OpenFn
summary: Workflow and integration platform for connecting systems and automating public-sector processes.
implementationNotes: Treat workflows as auditable public-sector operations
Document every connector and transformation

name: OpenFisca
summary: Rules-as-code engine for tax, benefits, eligibility, and policy simulation.
implementationNotes: Make eligibility logic testable and reviewable
Keep policy rules separate from user records

name: ODK
summary: Open-source field data collection tools for offline surveys and programme operations.
implementationNotes: Use when field collection is required before a national service exists
Plan data cleanup and consent before scale

name: Open Contracting
summary: Open Contracting Data Standard and tools for publishing and analyzing procurement data.
implementationNotes: Align procurement events to OCDS where possible
Protect sensitive supplier and payment details
